message:
perf: FMA in scatter_add + banded_attention dot/saxpy

Small cleanup: the remaining mul+add pairs in scatter_add_weighted_f32
and banded_attention's dotBf16F32 / saxpyF32Bf16 didn't pick up
relaxed_madd from just the earlier int4-matmul change. Route them
through the same fma4 helper.

Browser bench: 67/164/358 → 66/159/346 ms (~2% faster). Cross-backend
span parity holds.
